rationale: The cited paper is highly aligned with the citing paper’s core measurement problem: it analyzes response-style contamination of marketing scale scores/correlations, while the citing paper’s contribution centers on modeling systematic stable/transient measurement error and wording-related item-subset effects in panel SEM. Given this direct conceptual-method overlap (and an exact DOI match), the citation is plausibly methodological/foundational rather than an obvious incidental mention.
